rulesets.name: Customer Data Cleanup
rulesets.description: Standardise customer records: names, emails, gender, DOB, phone, segment

rules.name: Trim full_name
rules.description: Remove leading and trailing whitespace from customer names

rules.name: Lowercase email
rules.description: Normalise all email addresses to lowercase

rules.name: Trim email
rules.description: Remove spaces around email addresses

rules.name: Standardise gender
rules.description: Map all gender variants to Male / Female / Other / Unknown

rules.name: Normalise date_of_birth to ISO 8601
rules.description: Convert US-format dates (MM/dd/yyyy) to ISO 8601 (yyyy-MM-dd)

rules.name: Default missing segment
rules.description: Fill blank or null segment with Standard

rules.name: Trim segment
rules.description: Remove whitespace around segment values

rules.name: Uppercase segment
rules.description: Normalise segment to uppercase: PREMIUM / STANDARD / BASIC

rules.name: Remove phone currency noise
rules.description: Strip non-phone characters (letters, symbols) from phone field

rules.name: Trim phone
rules.description: Trim surrounding whitespace from phone number

rulesets.name: Employee Record Normalisation
rulesets.description: Normalise employee data: emails, join dates, department, salary, boolean fields

rules.name: Trim full_name
rules.description: Remove whitespace from employee names

rules.name: Lowercase email
rules.description: Normalise corporate email to lowercase

rules.name: Trim email
rules.description: Trim email whitespace

rules.name: Normalise join_date to ISO 8601
rules.description: Convert DD/MM/YYYY join dates to ISO 8601

rules.name: Normalise department
rules.description: Normalise department casing to Title Case

rules.name: Strip salary currency symbols
rules.description: Remove ₹ symbol, commas and spaces from salary field

rules.name: Default missing salary
rules.description: Replace N/A or blank salary with 0

rules.name: Normalise is_active to boolean string
rules.description: Standardise all boolean-like values to true / false

rules.name: Normalise employment_type
rules.description: Normalise employment type casing and variants

rules.name: Lowercase manager_email
rules.description: Normalise manager email to lowercase

rulesets.name: Order Data Standardisation
rulesets.description: Clean order records: status, dates, currency symbols, payment method

rules.name: Normalise order status
rules.ruleConfig: {"mappings": {"pending": "Pending", "PENDING": "Pending", "Processing": "Pending", "processing": "Pending", "shipped": "Shipped", "SHIPPED": "Shipped", "in transit": "In Transit", "IN TRANSIT": "In Transit", "In transit": "In Transit", "delivered": "Delivered", "DELIVERED": "Delivered", "cancelled": "Cancelled", "CANCELLED": "Cancelled", "Canceled": "Cancelled", "canceled": "Cancelled", "returned": "Returned", "RETURNED": "Returned"}}
rules.description: Standardise order status to Title Case canonical values

rules.name: Normalise order_date to ISO 8601
rules.description: Convert DD/MM/YYYY order dates to ISO 8601

rules.name: Normalise delivery_date to ISO 8601
rules.description: Convert delivery date to ISO 8601

rules.name: Strip unit_price currency symbols
rules.description: Remove ₹ prefix and INR suffix from unit_price

rules.name: Strip total_amount currency symbols
rules.description: Remove ₹ and commas from total_amount

rules.name: Strip discount_pct percent sign
rules.description: Remove percent sign from discount_pct — keep numeric value only

rules.name: Normalise payment_method
rules.ruleConfig: {"mappings": {"upi": "UPI", "UPI": "UPI", "credit card": "Credit Card", "CREDIT CARD": "Credit Card", "debit card": "Debit Card", "DEBIT CARD": "Debit Card", "net banking": "Net Banking", "NET BANKING": "Net Banking", "cash on delivery": "Cash on Delivery", "CASH ON DELIVERY": "Cash on Delivery", "cod": "Cash on Delivery", "wallet": "Wallet", "WALLET": "Wallet"}}
rules.description: Normalise payment method to canonical casing

rules.name: Default missing delivery_date
rules.description: Fill blank delivery dates with TBD

rules.name: Default missing quantity
rules.description: Fill blank quantity with 1

rules.name: Uppercase product_name
rules.description: Trim whitespace from product names
